goals: Explore the workspace directory structure to understand available files and folders
Search for files related to interface design or document management
Read relevant design or configuration files to understand the project structure
Create or update a file needed for implementing the interface

user_agent_config.personality: Practical and methodical. Prefers understanding the full context before implementing solutions. Works well with visual designers to translate designs into functional interfaces.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced with file systems and project structures. Familiar with document management concepts but may not know specific tool names or internal workspace APIs. Will need to discover available files and their purposes through exploration.

end_condition: The user has explored the workspace, found relevant interface or design files, understood the project structure, and created or updated a file needed for their interface implementation work.
